targetCurrentState.head: ba6cba1ece649d985438713b4583bfa36f008518
targetCurrentState.latestSubject: docs(governance): 记录 P1F AI 分析运行时验收证据

canonicalGsapPluginInventory.licenseDecision: No premium or Club GSAP plugin is authorized or required by canonical source evidence.

animationInventory.moveDifference: detectMoves(prevFen,newFen) matches appeared pieces to disappeared same-piece or same-color pieces and returns null for no change or more than four changed squares.
animationInventory.moveAnimation: After Vue renders the new FEN, image[data-square=to] tweens attr x/y from the previous square to the rendered square with duration 0.28 and ease power3.out.
animationInventory.capturePromotionCastlingEnPassant: Covered by the same changed-square diff: captures and en passant remove pieces, promotion matches same color when type changes, castling allows up to four changed squares.
animationInventory.snapback: Illegal or cancelled drag calls snapBackGhost(from), tweening the fixed ghost to squareCenterPx(from) with duration 0.22 and ease power3.out before clearMoveDrag.
animationInventory.dragSettle: Successful drag suppresses the next FEN slide, settles the ghost to target with opacity 0 over 0.18 power2.out, then fades the rendered target piece in over reduced-motion-aware 0.15 power1.out.
animationInventory.reducedMotion: motionDuration(duration) returns 0 when prefers-reduced-motion is reduce; canonical ANIM_DURATION 0.28 is raw and must become governed in target.
animationInventory.cleanup: onBeforeUnmount disconnects ResizeObserver, removes radial listeners, kills live preview, selection, destination, last-move, check, and ghost tweens.

radialMenuInventory.trigger: Right pointer button opens the menu from board pointerdown; contextmenu also opens it unless suppressed.
radialMenuInventory.openingConditions: Not in boardEditor.isEditing, not already suppressed by recent close, and not blocked by active radial/menu state.
radialMenuInventory.geometry: Fixed 300px menu centered at client x/y; center 150, outer radius 141, inner radius 48, label radius 96, hit radius 45-168.
radialMenuInventory.selection: Pointer angle maps to slice index; selected shortcut is emitted and also applied by brushStore while open.
radialMenuInventory.dismissal: Pointerup commits selected shortcut; window blur closes without commit; close suppresses native context menu for 260ms.
radialMenuInventory.animation: GSAP core fromTo/to open, close, and active-indicator opacity with reduced-motion-aware durations.

editorInventory.modes: Board mode is edit when boardEditor.isEditing, place when free and placing, move when interactive or free, otherwise view.
editorInventory.stateOwner: boardEditorStore owns isEditing, selectedPiece, sideToMove, castlingRights, and editable board grid.
editorInventory.entry: TeachingWorkspace freeSetup action cancels analysis, disables brush, hides drawing layer/sidebar, starts editing from pgn.currentFen, marks view illegal, and shows BoardEditorPanel.
editorInventory.placement: Click empty/occupied square with selected piece places/replaces; click occupied square without selected piece picks it up and removes it; right click removes piece.
editorInventory.dragOutside: Dragging an editor piece outside the board removes it from the source square.
editorInventory.metadata: Editor supports side to move and KQkq castling rights; en-passant output is '-' and half/fullmove are '0 1'.
editorInventory.fenBoundary: generateFenString returns placement side castling '-' 0 1; finish inserts a manual PGN only through pgn.insertPgnFromFen and restores editor on invalid FEN.

wheelNavigationInventory.direction: deltaY > 0 dispatches pgnStore.nextStep(); deltaY < 0 dispatches pgnStore.prevStep().
wheelNavigationInventory.consumption: Canonical template prevents default for all wheel events on the board wrapper, then code returns early when disabled or incompatible.
wheelNavigationInventory.enabledSources: Analysis source enables wheel navigation; electronic-board live and online-game live disable it.
wheelNavigationInventory.conflicts: Disabled while boardEditor.isEditing or radial menu open.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Detect single-ply FEN transitions and tween rendered SVG image attr x/y from old square to new square.
sourceToTargetMapping.currentTargetBehavior: FEN prop changes replace rendered pieces immediately; only CSS opacity transitions exist.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Port detectMoves, compose a scoped GSAP animation controller, and observe board position transitions without owning chess state.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Quiet move, capture, castling, promotion, en passant, rapid navigation, orientation change, and resize during animation.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Illegal or cancelled drag keeps the ghost visible and tweens it back to the source square before clearing drag state.
sourceToTargetMapping.currentTargetBehavior: Invalid or cancelled drag clears ghost immediately.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Expose snapback controller from board pointer logic and preserve final state equality whether enabled or disabled.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Illegal move, cancelled drag, pointer release outside board, touch cancellation, interrupted snapback, and reduced motion.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Framework-free FEN grid diff returns PieceMove[] or null.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Copy mechanically with target import path adaptation to domain/fenBoard.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Static parse plus browser animation cases.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Fixed radial SVG menu with shape, width, and color slices; GSAP open/close/indicator animation.
sourceToTargetMapping.currentTargetBehavior: No radial menu rendering, state, or commands.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Migrate component behind target semantic tokens and a store-free command contract.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Open, geometry, all commands, dismissal, orientation independence, viewport bounds, touch, context menu, listener cleanup.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Board right-click/pointer gestures open, track, select, commit, dismiss, and suppress native context menu.
sourceToTargetMapping.currentTargetBehavior: Board overlay prevents contextmenu only; no menu state.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Compose canonical controller but dispatch commands through emitted board events or injected callbacks, not brush store imports.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: No duplicate annotation commands and no stuck pointer capture when radial is disabled or dismissed.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Pinia store owns editable grid, side-to-move, castling rights, selected piece, FEN generation.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Create board-scoped draft controller or feature store with explicit activation; do not silently replace PGN state.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Placement, replacement, removal, drag outside, clear, reset, FEN, invalid FEN, exit, cancellation.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Piece palette, side-to-move, castling toggles, clear, reset, and finish action.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Migrate panel under board feature tokens and emit finish/cancel without adding a second workspace shell.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Palette behavior, controls, reduced motion, responsive sizing, no PGN mutation until accepted.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Toolbar freeSetup action enters editor, hides incompatible UI, finish inserts generated FEN as a manual PGN through PGN owner.
sourceToTargetMapping.currentTargetBehavior: Toolbar has no free setup action and PGN store lacks insertPgnFromFen.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Add explicit product enablement and PGN acceptance callback in P1B3.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: No unintended PGN mutation while editing; restoration of normal board mode after finish/cancel.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Prevent default on board wheel, ignore small deltas, throttle 60ms, deltaY positive next and negative previous.
sourceToTargetMapping.currentTargetBehavior: No wheel listener or board-level navigation.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Emit navigation intent or call an injected command boundary; board must not import PGN store.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Previous/next, boundaries, trackpad deltas, throttling, preventDefault scope, inactive during gestures, cleanup.

sourceToTargetMapping.canonicalBehavior: Analysis source enables wheel navigation; electronic-board and online live sources disable it.
sourceToTargetMapping.currentTargetBehavior: Target currently has only analysis/manual PGN path.
sourceToTargetMapping.requiredAction: Default wheel off for reusable board, explicitly on for canonical analysis route, and off for future live/read-only adapters.
sourceToTargetMapping.validationRequirement: Source-specific enablement once live/read-only adapters exist.

currentTargetConflicts.conflict: Current drag cancellation clears ghost immediately, conflicting with canonical snapback timing.
currentTargetConflicts.requiredResolution: Replace immediate clear on invalid drag with optional snapback controller while preserving disabled behavior.

currentTargetConflicts.conflict: Current board has a single overlay for move and annotation events; advanced capabilities need deterministic priority with radial/editor/wheel.
currentTargetConflicts.requiredResolution: Introduce one interaction arbiter before adding listeners.

currentTargetConflicts.conflict: Target lacks FEN manual insert/load helpers required by canonical editor finish.
currentTargetConflicts.requiredResolution: Add explicit PGN acceptance boundary in P1B3; editor must not mutate PGN directly.

targetCapabilityContract.name: BoardAdvancedCapabilities
targetCapabilityContract.shape: one typed advanced-capability configuration object passed to CanonicalChessBoard and normalized before BoardView composition
targetCapabilityContract.backwardCompatibility: Existing consumers that omit advancedCapabilities keep current behavior except canonical product route may explicitly enable move/snapback animation and wheel navigation in P1B3.

parameterMatrix.runtimeEffect: Animates eligible FEN transitions with canonical GSAP move tween.
parameterMatrix.disabledBehavior: Render final FEN immediately without changing move legality or final state.
parameterMatrix.consumerOwner: TeachingWorkspace for product route; reusable consumer for isolated boards.
parameterMatrix.compatibilityImpact: Opt-in for reusable board; product restores canonical motion.

parameterMatrix.runtimeEffect: Animates illegal/cancelled drag ghost back to source.
parameterMatrix.disabledBehavior: Clear drag immediately and preserve board state.

parameterMatrix.default: canonicalProduct true for annotation-capable route, reusable consumer false
parameterMatrix.runtimeEffect: Installs right-click/context menu handling and renders canonical radial menu.
parameterMatrix.disabledBehavior: No radial listeners, no rendering, scoped contextmenu prevention remains only if other board modes require it.
parameterMatrix.eventImpact: Emits radial-command or calls injected command handler.
parameterMatrix.stateImpact: Temporary open, pointer, and selected-shortcut state only.

parameterMatrix.default: canonicalProduct true when workspace exposes free setup, reusable consumer false
parameterMatrix.runtimeEffect: Allows consumers to activate editor mode and render editor panel/palette.
parameterMatrix.disabledBehavior: No editor UI or editor pointer paths.

parameterMatrix.runtimeEffect: Switches board interaction into canonical editor placement/removal mode.
parameterMatrix.consumerOwner: Workspace owns active state for product route.
parameterMatrix.stateImpact: Temporary editable FEN draft only until consumer accepts.
parameterMatrix.compatibilityImpact: Must not mutate PGN without explicit commit.

parameterMatrix.default: canonicalProduct true for analysis PGN, reusable consumer false
parameterMatrix.runtimeEffect: Consumes board wheel events and dispatches previous/next navigation intent.
parameterMatrix.disabledBehavior: No wheel listener or preventDefault policy beyond browser defaults.
parameterMatrix.eventImpact: Emits board-wheel-navigation or invokes injected callback.
parameterMatrix.compatibilityImpact: Board does not become a current-node owner.

eventContract.move: Existing move-request remains the only normal move boundary.
eventContract.radialCommand: Emit canonical command ids shape/null, shape/square, shape/highlight, shape/arrow, width/0.08, width/0.16, width/0.28, color/index.
eventContract.editorDraftChange: Emit normalized draft FEN plus metadata after local edit; consumer may ignore.
eventContract.editorCommit: Emit generated FEN and metadata; consumer returns accepted/rejected through controlled state or callback.
eventContract.wheelNavigation: Emit previous or next intent; consumer decides whether boundary allows navigation.
eventContract.rejection: Callbacks may return false or a reason string; board keeps visual state coherent and does not own error display.

stateOwnership.animation: Observes DOM and position changes; never owns chess state.
stateOwnership.radialMenu: Owns temporary open, pointer, and selected shortcut state only.
stateOwnership.editor: Owns temporary editable position draft while active; PGN mutation requires explicit consumer accept.
stateOwnership.wheelNavigation: Owns throttling timestamp only; never owns current PGN node.
stateOwnership.pgn: src/stores/pgn.ts remains current game, current node, FEN, legal move, branch, promotion, annotation, and navigation owner.
stateOwnership.workspace: src/stores/workspace.ts remains orientation, toolbar, annotation tool/color, panel, and splitter owner.

implementationTokensRequired: editor panel spacing and chip geometry
radial color-mix and shadow values translated to semantic tokens
tokenRequirements.rule: No raw governed durations, easings, geometry, color, shadow, z-index, or control size values may remain in feature files after P1B3.

pieceAssets.licenseRisk: Existing P1B accepted Merida assets; no new asset copy is required in P1B3.

assetRequirements.editorAssets: Uses existing Merida piece resolver only.

requirements: Use Vue onMounted and onBeforeUnmount ownership.
Use gsap.context or equivalent scoped ownership where DOM scope exists.
Kill/revert timelines and tweens on interruption, unmount, disabled capability, and reduced-motion changes.
Define overwrite policy before animating the same target.
Prefer transform and opacity; SVG attr tweening is allowed only where canonical BoardView requires x/y.
Durations and easings resolve through semantic motion tokens or typed constants backed by this baseline.
Coordinate with ResizeObserver and orientation changes.
Use quickTo only for justified high-frequency pointer updates.
Snapback must preserve board state integrity.
No decorative animation unrelated to product behavior.
Require real-browser validation for animated UI changes.
gsapSkillContract.authorityBoundary: Reusable animation implementation guidance only; it must not become a second project UI authority.

implementationSlices: P1B3.1 capability types, normalization, and no-op defaults
P1B3.2 GSAP Skill creation and animation controller
P1B3.3 radial menu component and command boundary
P1B3.4 editor draft/controller/panel and PGN acceptance boundary
P1B3.5 wheel navigation composable and PGN command injection
P1B3.6 TeachingWorkspace explicit product enablement and validation report

browserValidationPlan.capabilityCombinations: Each capability independently disabled, independently enabled, and relevant combinations with listener/UI removal proven.
